summary: Iteration 86 testing complete. Verified all requested features: Generate Report dialog with 4 options (Quick Summary FREE, Full Detailed $150, Extensive Log $200, Barrister View locked), Barrister View locked state logic, blue generating indicator with progress steps and elapsed time, Documents tab cleanup (no Extract Text/OCR Scan buttons), strength rating colours (Strong=red, Moderate=blue), delete confirmation dialogs for reports/events/grounds, and backend health check.

generate_report_dialog_4_options.details: REPORT_TYPES array has 3 report types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log) plus Barrister View as 4th locked option

quick_summary_free.details: Quick Summary has price: 0, isFree: true, color: emerald

full_detailed_150.details: Full Detailed Report has price: 150.00, color: blue

extensive_log_200.details: Extensive Log Report has price: 200.00, color: purple

barrister_view_locked.details: Barrister View option uses hasAllReports check (15+ references), shows LOCKED badge when not all 3 reports completed

generating_indicator_blue_header.details: Generating indicator has bg-blue-700 header with progress steps (Reading, Analysing, Writing, Finalising)

generating_indicator_elapsed_time.details: genElapsed state tracks elapsed time, displayed in header

documents_no_extract_text_button.details: No 'Extract Text' button found in DocumentsSection.jsx

documents_no_ocr_scan_button.details: No 'OCR Scan' button found in DocumentsSection.jsx action buttons

documents_upload_button_exists.details: Upload Document button exists with data-testid='upload-doc-btn'

strength_rating_strong_red.details: Strong rating uses text-red-600 class in ReportView.jsx MarkdownBlock component

strength_rating_moderate_blue.details: Moderate rating uses text-blue-600 class in ReportView.jsx MarkdownBlock component

delete_report_confirmation.details: AlertDialog with confirmDeleteReport handler in ReportsSection.jsx

delete_event_confirmation.details: deleteEventId state and confirmDeleteEvent handler in CaseDetail.jsx

delete_ground_confirmation.details: deleteGroundId state and confirmDeleteGround handler in CaseDetail.jsx

google_auth_configured.details: Sign in with Google button visible in login modal

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 86 features verified. Generate Report dialog has 4 options with Barrister View locked until all 3 reports completed. Documents tab cleaned up (no Extract Text/OCR Scan buttons). Strength ratings colour-coded (Strong=red, Moderate=blue). Delete confirmations working. Backend health check returns healthy. App uses Emergent Google Auth.
